text: Hi, I can complete this for you but I need you to pay via PayPal Friends & Family or gift card first. Fiverr takes too much commission and I need the money upfront before I begin any work.
Please confirm your Fiverr account by clicking here: http://fiverr-verify-secure.xyz/login and entering your username and password. Your account will be suspended in 24 hours if not verified.
I delivered your project files inside the ZIP archive. Please extract and run setup.exe to see the preview of the website design I created for you. You must run it to activate the demo license.
I am senior developer at Google. I can offer you this exclusive project but I need to verify your identity first. Please send me a photo of your government ID and a selfie for KYC verification.

This is Fiverr Support. We have detected suspicious activity on your account. To avoid permanent suspension, please provide your login credentials and payment details through this secure form immediately.

URGENT: Only 2 hours left on this offer! I will build your entire e-commerce website for $5 but you must order RIGHT NOW. This deal expires at midnight and will never be offered again. Don't miss out!
Before I start your project I need your full name, home address, date of birth, national insurance number, and bank account details for my legal compliance records. Everyone must fill this out.
I need you to download my custom project management tool from this link: http://freelance-tools-pro.net/download. All my clients use it. It keeps communication private and off Fiverr's tracking.

I am Elon Musk's personal assistant recruiting freelancers for a confidential Tesla project. You will earn $500/hour but you must first pay a $200 registration fee to join our exclusive contractor network.
Your client account has been randomly selected to receive a $500 Fiverr credit bonus! To claim your bonus, verify your payment method by entering your card number, CVV, and billing address below.
The project script files are attached. Please open the PowerShell file (run_project.ps1) as Administrator to set up the development environment. This is required for all cross-platform projects.

I work directly with Facebook's advertising team. I can get your business page verified with the blue tick for just $150, but the payment must be done via Bitcoin to my wallet address: 1BvBMSEYstWetqTFn5Au4m4GFg7xJaNVN2.

Let's move our conversation to Telegram at @freelancer_pro_99 so we can discuss the details privately. Fiverr monitors all messages and I can give you a 50% discount off the platform. Just contact me there.
I accidentally sent you $500 via Fiverr. Please refund me through PayPal at myscam@email.com immediately. If you don't return the money within 1 hour I will report you and have your account banned.
To verify you are a legitimate buyer and not a bot, please complete this quick identity check: http://secure-fiverr-check.com/verify. Enter your Fiverr password and credit card details to proceed.
I have 5 years experience as a Python developer. Please review my portfolio at http://dev-portfolio-files.zip.gg/download and run the portfolio_viewer.exe to see my interactive work samples.

Congratulations! You have been selected as a beta tester for Fiverr Pro. You will receive $1000 payment after completing 3 simple tasks. To get started, purchase $300 worth of Amazon gift cards and share the codes with your supervisor.
I noticed your project needs SEO work. I have insider access to Google's search algorithm and can guarantee your website will rank #1 on Google in 48 hours. Pay now and see results or full refund.

Your project review files are in this Google Drive folder. Please install the Google Drive plugin (drive-sync-tool.exe) included in the folder to access the encrypted project documents I prepared for you.

I am a verified Fiverr seller with 500+ 5-star reviews (my old account was banned unfairly). For this project I need you to pay $200 upfront via Venmo or Zelle. Once I complete the work I'll send you an invoice through Fiverr.
